---
title: "Talks"
toc: false
---

### Adventures in Building CLIP and Other (Largeish) LMs

October 10, 2023 · `MLOps.community` · 1h 06m 38s · [Watch on YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=RHn1VlXJ7CU)

<div style="position: relative; padding-bottom: 56.25%; height: 0; overflow: hidden; margin-bottom: 1.5rem;">
  <iframe style="position: absolute; inset: 0; width: 100%; height: 100%;" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/RHn1VlXJ7CU" title="Adventures in Building CLIP &amp; Other (Largeish) LMs // Sachin Abeywardana // MLOps Podcast #180" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" allowfullscreen></iframe>
</div>

### ProFeTorch

March 1, 2020 · `DataScienceSydney` · 33m 29s · [Watch on YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=SHmvCOyKYf4)

<div style="position: relative; padding-bottom: 56.25%; height: 0; overflow: hidden; margin-bottom: 1.5rem;">
  <iframe style="position: absolute; inset: 0; width: 100%; height: 100%;" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/SHmvCOyKYf4" title="SACHIN ABEYWARDANA: &quot;ProFeTorch&quot;" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" allowfullscreen></iframe>
</div>

### Probabilistic Programming and Deep Bayesian Networks

November 4, 2018 · `DataScienceSydney` · 32m 17s · [Watch on YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=wngizelcVtQ)

<div style="position: relative; padding-bottom: 56.25%; height: 0; overflow: hidden; margin-bottom: 1.5rem;">
  <iframe style="position: absolute; inset: 0; width: 100%; height: 100%;" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/wngizelcVtQ" title="DSS 20-10-18 SACHIN ABEYWARDANA: &quot;PROBABILISTIC PROGRAMMING AND DEEP BAYESIAN NETWORKS&quot;" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" allowfullscreen></iframe>
</div>

### Generative Adversarial Networks

March 21, 2018 · `DataScienceSydney` · 37m 44s · [Watch on YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=9XerjeD5DC0)

<div style="position: relative; padding-bottom: 56.25%; height: 0; overflow: hidden; margin-bottom: 1.5rem;">
  <iframe style="position: absolute; inset: 0; width: 100%; height: 100%;" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/9XerjeD5DC0" title="DSS 02.18. Sachin Abeywardana &quot;Generative Adversarial Networks&quot;" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" allowfullscreen></iframe>
</div>

### Trump Tweets: Fun with Deep Learning

November 12, 2017 · `DataScienceSydney` · 40m 09s · [Watch on YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=m5oH-IYIm9M)

<div style="position: relative; padding-bottom: 56.25%; height: 0; overflow: hidden; margin-bottom: 1.5rem;">
  <iframe style="position: absolute; inset: 0; width: 100%; height: 100%;" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/m5oH-IYIm9M" title="DSS meetup Sept17: SACHIN ABEYWARDANA: &quot;TRUMP TWEETS: FUN WITH DEEP LEARNING&quot;" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" allowfullscreen></iframe>
</div>

### Deep Learning: Easier to Learn than you Think

September 11, 2016 · `DataScienceSydney` · 30m 08s · [Watch on YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=cyU9LqozRs8)

<div style="position: relative; padding-bottom: 56.25%; height: 0; overflow: hidden; margin-bottom: 1.5rem;">
  <iframe style="position: absolute; inset: 0; width: 100%; height: 100%;" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/cyU9LqozRs8" title="Data Science Sydney: SACHIN ABEYWARDANA &quot;Deep Learning: Easier to Learn than you Think&quot;" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" allowfullscreen></iframe>
</div>
